name: design-standards
description: Platform-agnostic design pack — applies to Web, iOS, and Android. accessibility (WCAG 2.2 + Swift traits + Compose semantics), information-architecture, aesthetic-coherence, design-laws (color strategy axis, anti-AI-slop, absolute visual bans, category-reflex check — from pbakaus/impeccable), brand-research (fact verification before designing + asset collection: logo → product imagery → UI screenshots → color → font), creative-direction (signals that separate memorable from functional-but-forgettable UI).
